data.content: Implementation review approved. Remote branch codex/820f-codex-5-6-models resolves to tagged commit b85d2479 and is a clean one-commit diff from origin/main. The implementation uses the verified CLI slugs, preserves exact runtime model IDs, produces distinct canonical Sol/Terra/Luna labels, and proves the existing low/high/xhigh reasoning configuration reaches model_reasoning_effort. Scanner, identity matrix, runtime adapter, audit, and contract coverage are aligned. Diff check and all recorded quality gates pass; no security, performance, maintainability, or workflow-authority regressions found.
